title: Potato Cannon Ammo Counter
description: Allows you to see how much ammo you have in inventory
body:
# Potato Cannon Ammo Counter

This is version of my previous mod [Arrow Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/arrow-display) what allows you to see how much arrows you have in inventory. This version is same but works for [Create mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)'s potato cannon.

If you hold potato cannon in mainhand or offhand you can see small thing under crosshair

and the nuber is how much ammo you currently has in inventory

Costumization

By pressing **_N_** key, you can switch between _under crosshair_ and _above crosshair
_


## Counts on:
### Vanilla:


<details>
<summary>Vanilla</summary>

"minecraft:golden_apple",
"minecraft:baked_potato",
"minecraft:carrot",
"minecraft:poisonous_potato",
"minecraft:chorus_fruit",
"minecraft:glistering_melon_slice",
"minecraft:apple",
"minecraft:glow_berries",
"minecraft:cake",
"minecraft:golden_carrot",
"minecraft:melon_slice",
"minecraft:pumpkin",
"minecraft:melon",
"minecraft:potato",
"minecraft:sweet_berries",
"minecraft:enchanted_golden_apple",
"minecraft:pumpkin_pie",
"minecraft:beetroot"

</details>





### Create:
